% manuscript.tex — neutral article-class template for Research Vault manuscripts.
% Venue-agnostic (article/preprint class); adopter-swappable via the §5J.6 seam.
% Generated by `rv manuscript new` — replace {{MS_ID}} and {{THESIS}} at scaffold time.
%
% ONE template (v1 cut per §5J.8). Venue-specific templates (NeurIPS, ICML, journal
% classes) are deferred — the config seam (manuscript/style.py per_section_tips) is
% the primary customization surface for v1.
%
% Anti-fabrication constraints enforced by structure:
%   - citations: every \cite{key} must resolve in refs.bib (built from literature/ notes)
%   - results: every number must be a \result* macro from results.tex (machine-injected)
%   - provenance: manuscript_hash + results_hash stamped in the note's frontmatter
%
% sr: SR-MS-1a
%
\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}

% ── Encoding and fonts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage{microtype}          % improved typography

% ── Mathematics ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}

% ── References ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% natbib for author-year citations (\cite{key} → (Author, Year))
\usepackage{natbib}

% ── Figures and tables ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}           % professional-quality tables
\usepackage{float}

% ── Hyperlinks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{hyperref}
\hypersetup{
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=blue,
    citecolor=blue,
    urlcolor=blue,
}

% ── Page geometry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}

% ── Machine-injected results macros ───────────────────────────────────────────
% Populated by `rv manuscript compile` from hash-verified experiment results.
% Section prose references \resultAcc etc. — never literal numbers.
% NEVER hand-edit this file; always regenerate via rv manuscript compile.
\input{results}

% ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
\begin{document}

\title{{{THESIS}}}
\author{}   % Authors added by the adopter
\date{}
\maketitle

% ── Abstract ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\begin{abstract}
\input{sections/abstract}
\end{abstract}

% ── Introduction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Written LAST (sees whole paper) — see introduction section tip.
\section{Introduction}
\input{sections/introduction}

% ── Related Work ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Related Work}
\input{sections/related-work}

% ── Background (OPTIONAL) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Uncomment if --optional was passed to rv manuscript new.
% \section{Background}
% \input{sections/background}

% ── Method ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Method}
\input{sections/method}

% ── Experimental Setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Experimental Setup}
\input{sections/experimental-setup}

% ── Results and Discussion ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Results and Discussion}
\input{sections/results-discussion}

% ── Limitations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Limitations}
\input{sections/limitations}

% ── Ethics and Broader Impacts (VENUE-OPTIONAL) ───────────────────────────────
% Uncomment if --venue-optional was passed to rv manuscript new.
% \section{Ethics and Broader Impacts}
% \input{sections/ethics-impacts}

% ── Conclusion ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\section{Conclusion}
\input{sections/conclusion}

% ── Data and Code Availability (VENUE-OPTIONAL) ───────────────────────────────
% Uncomment if --venue-optional was passed to rv manuscript new.
% \section{Data and Code Availability}
% \input{sections/data-code-availability}

% ── References ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% refs.bib is auto-populated by `rv manuscript compile` from literature/ notes.
% Every \cite{key} must resolve in refs.bib; unresolved citekeys are a hard error.
\bibliographystyle{plainnat}
\bibliography{refs}

% ── Appendix ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\appendix

\section{Reproducibility}
\input{sections/appendix-repro}

\end{document}
